steps.title: Identify the question type
steps.content: Function question. The underlined sentence describes how Jinshanzhuang firms coordinated transport of the fish from Vietnam and Malaysia to North America. The following sentence claims: "This route reveals the multinational dimensions of the trade networks linking Chinese diaspora communities." The underlined sentence provides the specific route details that justify that significance claim.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'efforts to determine the country of origin...remain inconclusive': misreads the underlined sentence, which confidently names origin locations (Vietnam, Malaysia) rather than describing inconclusive efforts. ✗
  • Choice B — 'provides information that helps support a claim about a discovery’s significance...in the following sentence': matches exactly — the route details supply the multinational evidence that the next sentence draws significance from. ✓
  • Choice C — 'traces the steps...to locate and recover the objects': confuses historical trade with archaeological methodology. The underlined sentence describes 1800s shipping, not excavation procedure. ✗
  • Choice D — 'outlines a hypothesis that additional evidence...casts some doubt on': the following sentence affirms and builds on the underlined sentence rather than undermining it. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
